description: The `NetConnectionProfile` DSC resource is used to manage the network connection profile for a network adapter.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `NetConnectionProfile` DSC resource is used to manage the network connection profile for a network adapter.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

InterfaceAlias.title: InterfaceAlias
InterfaceAlias.description: The alias of the network interface to configure. This is a mandatory property.

NetworkCategory.title: NetworkCategory
NetworkCategory.description:
The network category to assign. Accepted values are `Public`, `Private`, or `DomainAuthenticated`.
        This is a mandatory property.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/NetConnectionProfile
